title: Project Controls & Scheduling
description: Schedulers, planners, cost engineers, project controls
seedMustHaves: Primavera P6 or MS Project scheduling experience
Schedule baseline and progress update experience
Ability to read and interpret construction/engineering drawings at a coordination level
seedPreferred: MSP (Microsoft Project Server) or portfolio scheduling
Cost engineering or cost reporting support
EPC, data center, nuclear, or industrial project background
Delay analysis or time impact analysis exposure
seedDealBreakers: No scheduling software experience (P6, MSP, or MS Project)
Unable to meet on-site or client location requirements if stated in JD
No verifiable project scheduling or controls role history
